description: Poll .diablo/ for new audit reports every 3 minutes
prompt: Check if any new unprocessed Diablo audit files have landed in C:/Users/ross/Desktop/Projects/integrius-website-new/.diablo/. Look for .md and .json files. If any exist, read gate.json first to get the overall status, then read remediations/README.md, then work through each remediation file (critical first) deploying fix agents per category. After all fixes: npx tsc --noEmit, create branch fix/diablo-{date} from master, commit, push, open and merge a PR. If no .diablo directory exists or it's empty, do nothing.
